title: New&Muddy
description: This mod adds new functions to the mud and new mud related blocks like dried mud or dried bricks pillar.
body:
# New & Muddy

I felt that mud, compared to other building blocks like deepslate, didn't have much to offer. So, I added new features related to it! This project is helping me learn coding, and I really enjoyed making it. I plan to update this mod with new and improved functions.

## Functions:
- You can now find mud in normal swamps. In mangrove swamps, you will find sinking mud.

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

  ![Mud in swamps](https://i.imgur.com/z5B3SBG.png)

</details>


- You can create a dried version of mud. This can be achieved by smelting it in a furnace or 
 placing mud in the Nether.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Dried Mud.](https://i.imgur.com/JHLdSHt.png)

</details>


- Both packed and dried mud now have bricks, pillars, chiseled bricks, and polished versions.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mud Blocks.](https://i.imgur.com/GPpgV4a.png)

</details>


- You can now make mud farmland. It doesn't need water, but it is destroyed when someone walks over it.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mud Farmlands.](https://i.imgur.com/vpXJ6AJ.png)

</details>


- Mud now drops mudballs instead of the block itself. This is just an extra step, but I added it to make it work like clay in Minecraft. You can throw mudballs to leave mud splashes on the ground.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mud balls.](https://i.imgur.com/n39NlYA.png)

</details>


- Mud lamps can now be crafted with mud brick slabs and frog lights.
  
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Mud lamps.](https://i.imgur.com/aTQqWxt.png)

</details>
